content: ~ We have successfully escaped the pancake.
Traditional slides are flat. | Ours are fully oriented.
OBB math is now active. | Collisions follow the tilt.
~ Observe the Torus satellites circling the rim.
~ We injected the missing Y-Axis components.
Replaced 2D Guard logic. | Initialized FFI Buffers.
~ The geometry is solid and persistent.
~ We are not using the GPU for math.
The software render sleeps. | The physics loop pauses.
Static frame caching. | CPU usage falls to 0%.
